headline: Rare Earth Stocks, Copper Plays Surging; FCX, MP Near Buy Points
summary: Rare earth stocks and copper plays are flashing buy signals or close to it amid multiple catalysts.  MP Materials and USA Rare Earth are both near buy points, as is S&P 500 copper giant Freeport-McMoRan.  The copper price has rallied near an all-time high as markets brace for potential Trump tariffs news, with demand already outpacing supply.

headline: Watch These 5 Non-Tech Stocks Thriving in 2026 on AI Data Center Boom
summary: ETN, CAT, FCX, GEV and AA are five non-tech stocks benefiting from rising power, infrastructure and metal demand for AI data centers.
